rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0010
rows.name: Who are we searching for next?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0020
rows.name:
Right. One of our members left
NLA and hasn't returned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0030
rows.name: I want you to go bring him back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0040
rows.name: "Bring him back" means...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0050
rows.name: You already know where he is, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0060
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0070
rows.name: Eric, explain the details.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0080
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0090
rows.name:
I am Eric, captain of
Collepedian Team Eric.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0100
rows.name:
I'm embarrassed to admit it, but the person I
need you to bring back is my subordinate, Ted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0110
rows.name:
Ted couldn't accept the
current evacuation plan,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0120
rows.name:
and he ran off saying he
was going to stay here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0130
rows.name: We feared something like this might happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0140
rows.name:
First we left Earth, and now
we're leaving here too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0150
rows.name:
I'm sure plenty of others
are struggling with it as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0160
rows.name: Yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0170
rows.name:
To be honest, I haven't
fully processed it myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_JNK0010
rows.name: Anger

rows.label: xs32280100_SEL0010
rows.name: Argue that it's a selfish thing to do.

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0180
rows.name:
He must feel incredibly
cornered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_JNK0020
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: xs32280100_SEL0020
rows.name: Nod and agree that you feel the same way.

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0190
rows.name:
But he shouldn't have just run
off without saying anything, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0200
rows.name: I understand how Ted feels, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0210
rows.name: Given the nature of our work as Collepedians,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0220
rows.name:
we interact with flora
and fauna a great deal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0230
rows.name:
Naturally, we develop a
strong attachment to them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0240
rows.name: I see[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0250
rows.name:
Flora and fauna are not included
in the evacuation plan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0260
rows.name: Right[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0270
rows.name: It's a difficult problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0280
rows.name:
Well, our only option right now
is to meet him and hear him out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0290
rows.name: Agreed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0300
rows.name:
I'm certain he is at the Canopied
Nightwood in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0310
rows.name: It's the location of our very first mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0320
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32280100_MSG0330
rows.name: We're counting on you.[ST:wait ]
